scripts.test: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.build:lsp-wasm: cargo build -p snaq-lite-lsp --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --lib && wasm-pack build crates/snaq-lite-lsp --target web --out-dir ../../apps/frontend/public/lsp-wasm
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run lint:frontend
scripts.smoketest: pnpm run bootstrap && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm -C apps/frontend run smoketest
scripts.bootstrap: pnpm run install:frontend && pnpm -C apps/frontend exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
